title: Language Change -  Device is out-of-date
scenario: Language change via Device Settings triggers firmware update prompt and applies language after DFU completes on non-latest firmware headset
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the paired headset name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on Language section
Select a different language from the available options
Observe the popup that appears: 'You must update the software to apply the selected language. The language change only applies to audio' with 'Later' and 'Update now' buttons
Follow the standard firmware update (DFU) process until completion
After update completes, observe the screen the user is directed to
Navigate back to Device Settings → Language section
Verify the selected language is displayed
expected: After the firmware update completes, the user is directed to the Home Screen. The headset's firmware is updated to the latest version. The selected language is properly reflected in the Language section of Device Settings, and the language change is applied successfully on both the app and the device.
